phases.title: Port canvas component
phases.description:
Goal: Port the source canvas component into the sandbox unchanged.

Source → target mapping rows

| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| /imported-source/frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx | /frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx | A | byte-identical copy |

Row ordering: Author files in dependency order — children before importers.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file; Class B → copy file FIRST, then edit applying the row's transform notes; Class C → write file (no `/imported-source/` counterpart); Class D → write file (transform notes carries the justification).
Catalogue lookup: For each Class B/D row, match the row's transform notes to the matching entry in the Call-site rewrite catalogue (system prompt) and quote that single entry's Recognizers / Target / Tool class block into the subagent brief. Do NOT paste the entire catalogue.
phases.notes: StarterCanvas is ported at /frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx and matches the imported source byte-for-byte.

Row ordering: Author files in dependency order — children before importers.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file; Class B → copy file FIRST, then edit applying the row's transform notes; Class C → write file (no `/imported-source/` counterpart); Class D → write file (transform notes carries the justification).

phases.notes: App shell is ported at /frontend/App.tsx as a byte-identical copy and renders the previously imported StarterCanvas component.

phases.title: Review the imported app for gaps and queue fix phases
phases.description:
Review the completed target app against the imported source under
/imported-source/. Identify import gaps, but do not fix them inline in this
phase.

Compare the source and target coverage for:
- routes & pages
- components
- backend functions
- serverless / edge / custom server routes
- dependencies
- styling & theming
- auth / env / assumptions

Additionally:
- run the project's build/typecheck to check for any remaining errors
- check the /plans/import-build-plan.json for any remaining deferred gaps that did not get addressed in later phases

For material gaps / build errors, append focused fix phase(s) with
`extend_phased_build_plan`. Each appended phase should be self-contained and small
enough for one context window.

Keep any comparison notes private or in tool arguments only; do not narrate the full
audit to the user. Do not re-queue gaps already covered by existing phases.

When all identified gaps have been queued, call `complete_build_phase`. If no gaps
are found, call `complete_build_phase` without appending phases.
phases.notes: Queued follow-up phase to fix the remaining strict TypeScript style-object gap in /frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx. No additional route, backend, dependency, auth, or source-coverage gaps were identified from the imported source or existing plan.

phases.title: Fix StarterCanvas strict style typing
phases.description:
Goal: Resolve the remaining strict TypeScript gap in the imported canvas component without changing runtime behavior.

Source → target mapping rows

| source path | target path | class | transform notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| /imported-source/frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx | /frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx | B | replace the conditional `null` object spread inside the canvas `style` prop with an object-only conditional expression so the file compiles cleanly under the sandbox's strict TypeScript settings while preserving the same fade-in transition behavior |

Observed gap: `/frontend/components/StarterCanvas.tsx` still contains `...(fadeIn ? { transition: 'opacity 0.35s ease' } : null)` in the canvas style object. Under the sandbox's strict TypeScript settings, that conditional spread is not object-safe and must be rewritten.

Row ordering: Author files in dependency order — children before importers.
Carve-out: Do not create, modify, or delete any file whose target path is not in the row list above.
Tool selection rule: Class A → copy file; Class B → copy file FIRST, then edit applying the row's transform notes; Class C → write file (no `/imported-source/` counterpart); Class D → write file (transform notes carries the justification).
phases.notes: StarterCanvas now uses an object-only conditional style expression for the fade-in transition and compiles under strict TypeScript without changing behavior.
